ig 1.0.19

  start      Starts an Invocation Grid.

  pack       Builds and packs an Invocation Grid into a zip file.

  stop       Stops an Invocation Grid.

  status     Shows a list of running Invocation Grids.

  attach     Attaches the ScaleOut service to an already-running IG worker
             process for debugging.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

commands.payload:
ig 1.0.19
Copyright (C), 2023 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  start      Starts an Invocation Grid.

  pack       Builds and packs an Invocation Grid into a zip file.

  stop       Stops an Invocation Grid.

  status     Shows a list of running Invocation Grids.

  attach     Attaches the ScaleOut service to an already-running IG worker
             process for debugging.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
ig 1.0.19
Copyright (C), 2023 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -c, --conn                 ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to
                             SOSS_IG_CONN environment variable.

  -n, --name                 Required. IG Name.

  -s, --startupSignalPort    Required. Port used by worker process to listen for
                             the IG startup signal from the local ScaleOut
                             service.

  -o, --object               Path to file to send as a parameter object to the
                             IG. Supplied to IG workers' Startup.Configure
                             method.

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
ig 1.0.19
Copyright (C), 2023 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -b, --buildconfig    (Default: Release) Build configuration.

  -r, --runtime        Packs the application with a specified .Net runtime
                       (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If omitted, the targeted .NET
                       runtime needs to be pre-installed on the ScaleOut host
                       machines.

  -t, --trim           (Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims unused
                       framework libraries from the package.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

result.stderr:
ig 1.0.19
Copyright (C), 2023 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -z, --zip             Deploys the specified IG zip package.

  -a, --assemblyname    Name of assembly to execute in IG. Defaults to the
                        assembly built by current directory's project file.

  -l, --localdev        Starts local development IG from build directory without
                        packaging.

  -i, --preinstalled    Starts a pre-installed IG executable. Supply the path to
                        a preinstalled assembly relative to Preinstalled IG
                        folder (C:\ProgramData\ScaleOut Software\PreinstalledIG
                        on Windows, or /usr/share/scaleout/preinstalled-ig on
                        Linux.), such as "myappDir/myapp.dll"

  -n, --name            IG Name. Defaults to the name of the assembly built by
                        current directory's project file.

  -c, --conn            ScaleOut connection string. Defaults to SOSS_IG_CONN
                        environment variable.

  -b, --buildconfig     (Default: Release) (Ignored if -z is used.) Build
                        configuration.

  -r, --runtime         (Ignored if -z is used.) Packs the application with a
                        specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If
                        omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be
                        pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.

  -t, --trim            (Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims
                        unused framework libraries from the package.

  -p, --params          Additional command-line parameter(s) to use when
                        launching IG processes.

  -o, --object          Path to file to send as a parameter object to the IG.
                        Supplied to IG workers' Startup.Configure method.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

staticCommands.name: attach
staticCommands.description: Attaches the ScaleOut service to an already-running IG worker process for debugging.

options.description: IG Name.
Port used by worker process to listen for the IG startup signal from the local ScaleOut service.
ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to SOSS_IG_CONN environment variable.
Path to file to send as a parameter object to the IG. Supplied to IG workers' Startup.Configure method.

staticCommands.name: pack
staticCommands.description: Builds and packs an Invocation Grid into a zip file.

options.description: Build configuration.
Packs the application with a specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.
(Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims unused framework libraries from the package.
Name of assembly to execute in IG. Defaults to the assembly built by current directory's project file.
(Ignored if -z is used.) Build configuration.
ScaleOut connection string. Defaults to SOSS_IG_CONN environment variable.
Starts local development IG from build directory without packaging.

Starts a pre-installed IG executable. Supply the path to a preinstalled assembly relative to Preinstalled IG folder (C:\ProgramData\ScaleOut Software\PreinstalledIG on Windows, or /usr/share/scaleout/preinstalled-ig on Linux.), such as "myappDir/myapp.dll"
(Ignored if -z is used.) Packs the application with a specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.
(Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims unused framework libraries from the package.
Deploys the specified IG zip package.
